prompt:
A two-page star-hop record open on a desk, showing a path from a bright anchor star toward a faint target galaxy with orientation arrows and confidence marks. Pencil lines, star dots, and a compact atlas nearby make it clearly a deep-sky re-acquisition log.

Photorealistic 512×512 image with soft low field lighting, realistic paper and graphite texture, no logos, no readable text, and no identifiable faces. Keep the open pages centered and uncluttered.
